query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, c.role as consultor_role, c.managedProgramId, c.canLogin, u.id as userId, u.role as user_role, u.consultorId FROM consultors c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.consultorId = c.id WHERE c.role = 'gerente' ORDER BY c.id DESC;
